Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ADRIEANNETTE L. CICCONE, ESQ. of Law Offices of Robert S. Gitmeid, P.C. (Tel: 619-727-8997) specially appearing for attorney Paul Brisson as the moving party and attorney-of-record for defendant Aya Cuzner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Attorney Paul Brisson's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Defendant Aya Cuzner.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Based on the representations made by counsel to the Court at today's hearing, the Court grants attorney Paul Brisson's motion to be relieved as counsel for defendant Aya Cuzner.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
